name: reflexion
description: Collection of commands that force LLM to reflect on previous response and output. Based on papers like Self-Refine and Reflexion.

interface.shortDescription: Reflect, critique, and memorize implementation lessons
interface.longDescription: Self-refinement workflows for reviewing agent output, finding missed requirements, improving work, and preserving lessons in memory.
defaultPrompt: Reflect on the last implementation and fix important issues
